principle: make it work, measure it, fix real bottlenecks, document decisions, move forward

sessions.name: Tooling and compilation
sessions.goal: Install or verify Rust/k6 and make the scaffold compile.
sessions.success: Cargo compiles, tests pass, clippy is clean or produces a small fix list.

sessions.name: Mock SSE and direct baseline
sessions.goal: Run the mock SSE server and measure direct k6 baseline.
sessions.success: Mock responds with [DONE], k6 records RPS/P99/error rate.

sessions.name: Gateway local mock
sessions.goal: Run the Rust gateway and validate health/ready/chat streaming.

sessions.name: Proxy to mock upstream
sessions.goal: Replace internal mock response with real proxy to external mock SSE.
sessions.success: Client receives upstream chunks through the gateway.

sessions.name: Direct vs gateway comparison
sessions.success_green: Gateway RPS >= 98% of direct and P99 approximately flat.
sessions.success_yellow: Gateway RPS >= 90% of direct with correct streaming behavior.

sessions.name: Ollama local upstream
sessions.goal: Use Ollama OpenAI-compatible as first real local upstream.
sessions.success: Real stream via gateway with TTFT recorded.

sessions.name: vLLM native parity
sessions.goal: Compare direct vLLM versus gateway to vLLM.
sessions.success_green: Gateway RPS >= 98% of direct vLLM, P99 approximately flat, TTFT overhead documented.
sessions.success_yellow: Gateway RPS 90-98% with correct behavior, optimization task opened.

sessions.name: Real telemetry final event
sessions.goal: Replace mock telemetry with request accumulator.
sessions.success: Final event includes request_id, timings, bytes, status and error_class.

sessions.name: JSONL micro-batching
sessions.goal: Persist telemetry in simple batches before Parquet/DuckDB.
sessions.success: Logs appear in batches and client does not wait for disk.

sessions.name: Basic profiling
sessions.success: Hotspots and suspicious allocations are documented.

sessions.name: GitHub alpha
sessions.success: README, CI, license, benchmark, templates and roadmap are ready.
